'''Clan Doneeta''' was a wealthy [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] family on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]],<ref name="totj" /> the name of which meant "sure" or "wise" in [[Twi'leki/Legends|Ryl]] [[Language/Legends|language]].<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> They had a multi-generational feud with [[Clan R'lyek]]. In [[3986 BBY]], the clan was exiled from their home on Ryloth and forced to relocate to their new city, losing nearly all of their possessions and many lives in the process. They only survived due to the help of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tott Doneeta]].<ref name="totj" />

The feud with the R'lyeks ended shortly afterwards, again due to Tott. It resulted in the two clan leaders going out to die in the [[Bright Lands]], them being replaced with younger leaders who would be more willing to support the peace.<ref name="totj" />

The clan still existed as of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when they possibly owned [[Ryloth Ventures]].<ref name="ins">{{InsiderCite|72|CIS Shadowfeed Year's Start Fete Day Edition}}</ref><ref name="tcswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref><ref name="tcswe" /><ref name="jas">''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]''</ref>
